blocks.title: Basic If Statement

blocks.content: In the first example, the message prints because age >= 18 is true. In the second, nothing prints because score >= 60 is false.

blocks.title: 💡 Code Blocks
blocks.content: The code inside { } is called a code block. It runs as a unit. Always use { } with if statements!

blocks.title: If with Comparisons

blocks.instruction: Complete the if statement to check if x is greater than 10:
blocks.explanation: Use > to check if x is greater than 10.

questions.question: What does an if statement do?
options: Runs code only when a condition is true
Runs code only when a condition is false
questions.explanation: An if statement executes the code block only if the condition inside the parentheses is true.
